generated_oml:
namespace base = "http://example.org/base"
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://example.org/DTDFVocab"
instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operations for Facility Managers"
]
instance PredictiveMaintenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance recommendations based on analytics"
]
instance PerformanceForecastingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Performance forecasting for building systems"
]
instance OperationalEfficiencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized operational efficiency metrics for building systems"
]
instance DecisionMakingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Enhanced decision-making support for infrastructure management across the building life cycle"
]
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring through data-driven insights for Facility Managers"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]
instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for maintenance and performance forecasting"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveMaintenanceInsight, PerformanceForecastingInsight
]
instance OperationalEfficiencyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of operational efficiency for building systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalEfficiencyInsight
]
instance EnhancedDecisionMakingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enhanced decision-making capabilities for AECO stakeholders"
    DTDFVocab:provides DecisionMakingInsight
]
instance MDEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering principles for extracting structured representations and generating deployable Digital Twin artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, OperationalEfficiencyOptimizationService, EnhancedDecisionMakingService
]
instance BIMGeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric models derived from Building Information Modeling for spatial representation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEEnabler
]
instance BuildingControlBehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral models defined via control logic by Building Control Engineers"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEEnabler
]
instance DTAnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical models integrated through custom services developed by DT Engineers"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEEnabler
]
instance BIMEnrichedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "BIM-enriched sensor definition from data sources"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BIMSensorDataTransmitted
]
instance BIMSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BIMEnrichedSensor
]
instance BIMSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "BIM-enriched sensor data for spatial representation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BIMSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEEnabler
]
instance AECOBuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Building or infrastructure asset within AECO domain integrating static design models with real-time operational data for life cycle management from design to operation and refurbishment"
    base:contains BIMEnrichedSensor, BIMSensorDataTransmitted, BIMSensorData, BIMGeometricModel, BuildingControlBehavioralModel, DTAnalyticalModel, MDEEnabler
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework utilizes Building Information Modeling (BIM) standards and Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) principles, with standardized extension points for interoperability and custom service integration. Specific industry standards, compliance frameworks, or certifications beyond BIM and MDE are not detailed in the provided documents."
]
